notes: The four-tier storage lexicon: Online (transactional) / Midline (fixed content) / Near-line (disk backup staging) / Offline (tape archive)
Broader framework into which Pools of Storage fits; ILM as 'getting control over storage'
Primary Maxtor brand aligned to the Midline pool
Mentioned as backplane standard for Serial Storage in a Box — allows mix of SAS and SATA drives
Mentioned as backplane standard for Serial Storage in a Box alongside SAS
New packaging concept — SAS/SATA backplane allowing plug-and-play population of any mix of SAS and SATA drives in a detached storage array
Interactive web-based tool to validate efficiencies and demonstrate ROI/TCO of a Pools of Storage program — core Phase 2 deliverable
Mentioned as target platform for Pools of Storage browser simulation tool
